claims_verified.claim: AC1: agent's words survive into VerdictError
claims_verified.evidence: verdict.py:312-317 builds snippet into last_error; test_verdict.py:167 asserts _AUTH_ERR, exit_reason='error', rc=1 in message; passed

claims_verified.claim: AC2 end-to-end budget honoured, no second truncation
claims_verified.evidence: worst-case str(exc)=40+62+2+180=284<300 (_ABSTENTION_REASON_MAX at local_merge.py:248,258); test_local_merge.py:242 asserts auth sentence in blocker summary; passed
verdict.py:261,312 slice [:180]; test_verdict.py:175 asserts longest x-run == _ERROR_TEXT_MAX; passed
verdict.py:312; test_verdict.py:187 asserts no \n/\t and 'line1 line2 line3'; passed

claims_verified.claim: AC5: empty/whitespace-only text keeps clean tail, no dangling separator
claims_verified.evidence: verdict.py:313-317 else-branch; test_verdict.py:207,217 assert exact tail; passed

claims_verified.claim: AC6: valid-JSON text on non-ok run never parsed, consumes retries
claims_verified.evidence: verdict.py:303 continues before parse at 320-321; test_verdict.py:227 asserts 3 calls / 'after 2 retries'; existing fail-closed tests unmodified

claims_verified.claim: AC7: quota path unchanged apart from text
claims_verified.evidence: same exit_reason!='ok' branch (verdict.py:303); QuotaAwareRunner/detect_quota untouched; test_verdict.py:237 asserts exit_reason='quota' and text present; passed
ruff 'All checks passed!'; basedpyright '0 errors, 52 warnings'; pytest '707 passed'

claims_verified.claim: No regression on dropped literal; blast radius (investigator/explorer/reviewer callers) safe
claims_verified.evidence: grep for 'not trustworthy' finds only an unrelated comment in oracle/runlog.py:99; full 707-test suite green

test_assessment: Every acceptance criterion has a covering test asserted through the public request_verdict/request_payload/run_security_panel. AC1→test_failed_run_error_carries_the_agents_own_words; AC2→test_panel_abstention_carries_the_agents_own_words (load-bearing, end-to-end through the panel); AC3→test_failed_run_error_snippet_is_bounded (asserts on _ERROR_TEXT_MAX, not eyeballed); AC4→test_failed_run_error_collapses_whitespace; AC5→test_failed_run_with_empty_text_reads_cleanly plus the whitespace-only boundary variant; AC6→test_failed_run_with_valid_verdict_json_is_never_parsed with existing fail-closed tests unmodified; AC7→test_failed_run_quota_path_carries_text_too. The one changed function (request_payload) has failure-mode coverage for empty, whitespace-only, oversized, multi-line, and schema-valid-JSON inputs; the empty/non-empty branch split is both exercised.
residual_risks: A real agent error longer than 180 chars is truncated mid-word — inherent to the bound and explicitly accepted by the spec (diagnostic only); the runner still logs the full text.

The AC2 budget (284<300) is coupled to max_retries=2 and the fixed prefix lengths; a future change raising max_retries or lengthening the base message could push str(exc) past 300 and re-truncate the tail. Comfortable margin today (196 ceiling, 180 chosen), but the two bounds live in different modules with no shared assertion.
